programmes.show_description: Apartheid drama with Stephen Dorff. An English youngster is shocked by the brutal racism endemic in his South African school, and vows to do everything he can to fight for justice.
Slithering scares from Hammer. A couple move to a Cornish village where it becomes apparent that locals are being killed by a snake-like creature and their neighbour harbours a terrible secret.

An 18-year-old sues the father of her child for return of her belongings and for filing allegedly false CPS reports.
A mother of two allegedly suffers a broken nose at the hands of her sister-in-law during a heated fight.
A man claims he was provoked by his landlord to retaliate online after she allegedly slandered a Nigerian immigrant.
A young couple with a child saves 3K for their first apartment but claim it was dreadful; they are accused of smoking pot.
A mother of two is accused of stealing her uncle's furniture after their lease-to-own agreement falls apart; she claims he took the furniture himself.
A man insists that a young boy looks and acts just like him but his ex-lover says it's impossible and sues him for filing for a paternity test.
A man and woman continue to live with each other 18 years after their divorce; when they finally part, the woman wants everything they shared.
When a young car salesman disrespects the Judge, she advises that he take his parents out to a long lunch when the show airs.
A landlord says he was conned into letting his tenants out of their lease; they sue him for the return of their security deposit.

A murdered US woman is found 230 miles from home, dumped from a bridge into swamp. Was she killed by someone she met online, or by her own husband?
US police find the dismembered body parts of a missing woman in an alligator-infested creek. They must race to prove who was responsible for this killing.
In October of 2023, Jessy Kurczewski went on trial for the intentional homicide of Lynn Hernan, along with two counts of felony theft for stealing from Hernan.
A father confesses to the murder of his daughter, which is later dismissed. Years later, new evidence points to a new suspect.
Palm Print Conviction: Analysing the evidence, the medical detectives solve real crimes using forensic techniques, alongside reconstructions (which may be unsuitable for younger viewers).

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Trivette's old girlfriend get his help to locate her father, and then kills him.
Sci-fi thriller with Jason Statham. A crooked prison warden coerces a falsely imprisoned convict into taking part in a high-octane race where convicts battle to the death in customised cars.
Action drama with Danny Trejo. A Mexican mercenary is hired to assassinate a politician, but when his employers betray him, he teams up with militant illegal immigrants to seek bloody revenge.
Gripping action thriller with Sam Worthington. When a troubled assassin hired to kill a young woman can't bring himself to pull the trigger, he chooses to protect her from her enemies instead.
Crime thriller with Adrien Brody. A trio of career criminals find themselves trapped in a warehouse with the police closing in, not realising that an even greater threat lurks inside.

A woman claims her friend lost one of her dogs and that another pet died on her couch while she was away on vacation.
When a warehouse worker asks to take a few days off, he claims his boss wrongfully terminated him.
A man abandons his fiancée but suggests they go on their kayaking honeymoon anyway; he is accused of stealing property when he doesn't get his way.
A woman and her ex-husband argue over the unpaid title loan on a Chevy Impala after she turns in the car for missing payments.
An elderly woman publicly berates her longtime rival throughout their neighbourhood; he sues her for harassment.
A man insists he owes nothing to his ex-babysitter because her boyfriend allegedly stole property, and she damaged his truck.
Unwed parents, with a 20 year age difference, fight over an alleged assault.

In May of 2019, Jennifer Farber Dulos dropped off her five children at school, drove to her Connecticut home, and was never seen again.
When Linda Anders is found dead at home, her wheelchair-bound husband Malcolm claims an intruder broke in. Police findings quickly change the course of the investigation.
Following a previous altercation, Cody Fisher was attending a Birmingham nightclub event with friends when he was attacked and stabbed in the chest, a 37-second fatal assault.
16-year-old Hani Hicham Abou El Kheir was fatally stabbed in London, UK, over twenty times on his way home in 2013 by a gang of up to ten masked youths.

Bookmaker Max Phillips learns that his son is dying in Vietnam, and risks everything to save him.
It is 2040. Boxing has been outlawed and is performed by androids, but one of the last human fighters has faith in a battered fighting robot.
Remake of the 1976 action thriller, with Ethan Hawke. A sergeant must protect cops and prisoners when his station is besieged by a corrupt policeman and his crew on New Year's Eve.
Tense thriller with Sam Worthington. An escaped convict threatens to jump from a skyscraper, while his brother takes advantage of the ensuing chaos to carry out a plan of his own.
